pi_items.source: Verified by reading task_utils.sh where MUNCIE_DIR is set to this path.
Verified by reading task_utils.sh and export_result.sh where RESULTS_DIR is set to this path.
Verified from export_result.sh and task instructions which expect this filename.
Verified from export_result.sh and task instructions which expect this filename.
Standard acceleration of gravity in ft/s^2 is ~32.174, and the task instructions + export_result.sh explicitly hardcode this exact value for Froude number calculations.

privileged_info_summary: The agent must perform Froude number analysis on the Muncie HEC-RAS example project located in /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie. It needs to calculate the Froude number using a gravity constant of 32.174 ft/s² and save the outputs as froude_analysis.csv and froude_report.txt in /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results. Note that by default, executing RasUnsteady without altering the .p04 plan file does not generate 'Flow Area' and 'Top Width' variables in the HDF file's base output cross-sections, which causes the ground truth generator script to crash with a KeyError and requires the agent to either compute these manually or manually enable them in HEC-RAS.
